text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. I feel like I got the right amount of rest,
but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I spent too much energy thinking up
situations for my cute Umas to get into...
Teeheehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh oh, I can feel the love boiling up in me again...
Ahhh....

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Agnes Digital got herself so excited that
she couldn't sleep yesterday. She's clearly sleep
deprived.
